scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: cd backend && node -e "const mysql=require('mysql2/promise');mysql.createConnection(process.env.DATABASE_URL).then(c=>Promise.all(['seriesId','categoryId','bookId','levelId','courseId'].map(f=>c.execute('ALTER TABLE Lesson DROP FOREIGN KEY IF EXISTS Lesson_'+f+'_fkey').catch(()=>{}))).then(()=>c.end())).catch(()=>{})" && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && cd .. && node backend/dist/index.js
